overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a dense coniferous forest with dramatic god rays filtering through the canopy. The scene transitions from an enclosed woodland path to an open mountainside vista revealing snow-capped peaks and a distant body of water.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along a narrow forest trail surrounded by tall pine trees and dense fern undergrowth, with two swords visible on his back

entered.detail: Towering pine trees forming a dense canopy overhead with visible god rays filtering through
Lush green ferns and shrubs lining both sides of the narrow dirt path
Winding dirt trail with patches of grass and exposed roots
Large boulders covered in green moss scattered among the trees

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dense, enclosed forest with towering coniferous trees creating a canopy overhead. God rays penetrate the foliage, illuminating the fern-lined dirt path as Geralt walks forward through the sheltered woodland interior.

events.description: sunbeams become more intense and direct as the forest canopy opens up
snow-capped mountain peak becomes visible through the trees ahead, indicating approach to forest edge

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding forest path with slight navigation around natural obstacles, maintaining steady pace toward the light

entered.detail: Snow-capped mountain peak becoming visible through the tree line in the distance
Fallen dead trees and broken branches scattered on the forest floor

segments.scene_description: As Geralt progresses, the dense forest begins to open up, with sunlight becoming more direct and intense. The path remains surrounded by conifers and ferns, but a distant snow-capped mountain becomes visible through the trees, signaling the approach to a clearing.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest edge with mountain vista overlooking water

events.description: emerging from dense forest into open clearing with panoramic view of snow-capped mountains and coastal water
full sunlight exposure as the tree canopy completely opens up to reveal open sky

agents.ego_description: walking toward the forest edge with the mountain range now dominating the background, approaching the open vista

entered.detail: Body of water visible in the distance to the right of the mountain range
Low bushes and dry grass replacing the dense ferns of the forest interior

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a dramatic transition as the forest gives way to an open mountainside vista. The dense canopy and ferns exit the frame, replaced by sparse scrub vegetation and a panoramic view of snow-capped mountains with a body of water visible in the distance under full morning sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sheltered coniferous forest that gradually opens into a vast, sunlit mountainside vista. It begins deep within an enclosed woodland interior, where god rays penetrate a dense canopy to illuminate a fern-lined dirt path. As the camera progresses forward, the foliage begins to thin and the sunlight becomes more direct, revealing the first glimpse of a distant snow-capped peak through the trees. The scene then expands as the forest gives way entirely to sparse scrub vegetation, shifting from the shaded woodland to a panoramic view of rugged mountains and a distant body of water under full morning light.
